'''Vissfil''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Brolf]] who worked for the resistance leader codenamed [[Filvian (Brolf)|Patriot]] in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. Patriot was in turn working for [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]] codenamed 'Defender' who was building a [[Missile/Legends|missile]] that he said was to assassinate [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]]. Vissfil was taller than his [[Vissfil's brother|brother]] and was armed with an [[Axe/Legends|ax]]. The two [[Gender/Legends|brothers]] captured [[Lorana Jinzler]] while she was following [[Jhompfi]], who had been seen accepting two [[burst thrusters]] from [[Duefgrin]] who had stolen them for him. On their way to deliver her to Patriot and Defender they knocked her out with a strong sedative. Later [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] showed up to rescue her. Vissfil and his brother were turned over to the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Police officer/Legends|police]] when they were found guarding Lorana.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
